title: Itemed arrows
description: Changes arrow model to item one.
body:
Pack changes arrows model to item-like model.

Optifine or any mods not required. #noptifine (optifine even can't change arrows model, muhahaha. >:) )

This is first approach of CEM-S: [Custom Entity Model Shader]([https://github.com/DartCat25/CEM-S](https://github.com/DartCat25/CEM-S)).

Wanted bugs.
